---

## 🤖 Tech & AI

### 🔥 Claude & Anthropic — Big Week
- **Code with Claude** London event: ~50% of attending devs shipped a PR written entirely by Claude in the past week — a remarkable adoption signal *(MIT Technology Review)*
- **Enterprise dominance:** Claude adoption up **+128% YoY** while OpenAI enterprise slipped **-8%** — Claude now leads enterprise AI market *(LiveNewsChat)*
- **Valuation surge:** Anthropic reportedly raising at **$900 billion** valuation — would surpass OpenAI *(TechCrunch)*
- **Claude Mythos** security model: finds software vulnerabilities at a level beyond many human experts *(Anthropic Release Notes)*
- **Claude for Small Business** launched: pre-built agentic workflows inside QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Google Workspace & Microsoft 365 *(PYMNTS)*

---

## 🧬 Health & Science

- 💊 **GLP-1 drugs confirmed** to significantly reduce heart attacks, strokes, and premature death — large international review strengthens long-term case for Wegovy/Ozempic *(Reuters Health)*
- 🩸 **Blood test for depression** may be coming — new study tracks how immune cells age as a biomarker *(BBC Science)*
- 🍔 **Junk food rewires young brains** permanently — effects persist even after switching to healthy diet in adulthood *(ScienceDaily)*
- ✂️ **CRISPR milestone:** First baby received fully personalised CRISPR gene therapy — not a generic one-size-fits-all treatment *(Live Science)*
- ⏰ **Age-related disease theory:** New research suggests conditions like Alzheimer's and heart disease may begin silently **decades before symptoms** appear *(Nature)*
